case_title: JAMES A. BACH VS. FUZZY PET HEALTH, INC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $180) SERVED JUL-07-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FUZZY PET HEALTH, INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY BACH, JAMES A. AS TO DEFENDANT FUZZY PET HEALTH, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-04-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JAMES A. BACH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FUZZY PET HEALTH, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZUBIN BHETTAY IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICES ARE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BACH, JAMES A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUZZY PET HEALTH, INC $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,375.00, CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT ZUBIN BHETTAY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $180) SERVED JUL-07-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BHETTAY, ZUBIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2022 - JUDGMENT.
